description: End-to-end composer.lock -> OSV path. drupal/node_view_permissions@1.6.0 is in the affected range (<1.7.0) of DRUPAL-CONTRIB-2026-034 / CVE-2026-8491, so the offline OSV index emits one osv-advisory finding. monolog/monolog@2.9.1 is a benign control with no advisory in the index. Source: vulnerabilities/osv/composer/DRUPAL-CONTRIB-2026-034.json.
